allow: PowerShell($files = @\('digital-gold.html','custom-jewelry.html','faq.html','physical-gold.html','gold-sip.html','partner.html','contact.html','how-it-works.html','blog.html','services.html','gold-rates.html'\); $old = 'Gold RatesBlogFAQPartner With Us'; $new = 'Gold Rates'; $count = 0; foreach \($f in $files\) { $path = "d:\\Cogent\\Goldnest\\$f"; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); if \($c.Contains\($old\)\) { $c = $c.Replace\($old, $new\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $c\); Write-Output "Trimmed navbar: $f"; $count++ } else { Write-Output "SKIP: $f" } }; Write-Output "Total updated: $count")
